x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The individual or entity placing money into an account.

Comment:
Examples
Can be a retail customer (personal savings, checking) or a corporate customer (business deposits).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The organization that provides the deposit service.

Responsible for holding funds, managing accounts, and providing interest or benefits.

Comment:
Examples include commercial banks, credit unions, or digital banks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensure the deposit service complies with laws, banking regulations, and safety measures.

Comment:
Examples: central banks, financial supervisory authorities, or deposit insurance agencies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Auditor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensure the bank adheres to KYC (Know Your Customer), AML (Anti-Money Laundering), and reporting requirements.
